review_text: Purchased a permanent brand new Villa. Living the simple life in Retirement

We love this place and are on yearly rotation stays now. Park is neat and clean, pool daily maintained, nostalgic cabins clean and tidy. Lots of beautiful native trees and bushes bring in a beautiful array of birds to watch while floating in the pool.
Park staff are so nice, they go above and beyond to make sure your stay is top-notch and just genuinely nice people 😊
Location is great, close to everything you want while on holiday.
As a single mother travelling with a young daughter this park feels safe.
Highly recommend.

Couldn't speak highly enough of these guys. My wife and I had car problems on arrival and we probably weren't the easiest customers constantly asking for help about mechanics, wreckers etc. but the staff made us to feel very much at home until we got ourselves a lift and sorted and made what was a fairly stressful situation much easier for us to work our way through... The park has got a lovely pool, really well kept, great showers (always important when camping)... Ooo yeah and 12 burners worth of BBQ so you can cook up an amazing feed here. We'll definitely stay here next time we're in Bateman's bay, hopefully in more relaxing circumstances.

Cabin is small but space is efficient and there are drawer spaces. The bunk beds are unfortunately right across the toilet and bath. Aircon is installed at the entrance where the dining, living area and kitchen are located, and it is opposite the main bedroom, which means it can get hot during hot days and nights. Luckily, it rained during our visit. We were able to use the common laundry machine and dryer.
Shockingly bad. From arrival, the place looks like armageddon just hit. Unkept, unclean, with surly owners who are pretty blunt and rude.

Hands down the worst place I've attempted to stay. On arrival yesterday, the bathroom emitted a strong urine stench which was noticeable from even sitting on the bed (1.5M away).

We asked for the bathroom to be cleaned, and someone came with a mop. We left to go and have lunch and when we returned, the stench was as strong as before.

Requested to be moved or the whole place be scrubbed top to toe. Ultimately we didnt feel safe or sanitary staying in this absolute dive, and when I requested the refund and advised the owners we refused to stay, I was met with aggression and poor excuses.

I think the cabins are so poorly put together and unkept, that years of urine have stained through the unsealed lino. It is far from acceptable to let anyone stay here.

Be warned, it's abhorrent.

*UPDATE The same day post my review*

Note the reply from the owner says I never stayed there - the booking was via my partner Sarah for 9/1/26. The cabin was number 25. I also have an audio recording of the unprofessional conduct and words of the owner upon leaving (uploaded for the public to hear).

Don’t think this is a fake review, this place is genuinely appalling. Be warned. Don’t even think about it.

Had a great 7 day stay at the park. Staff themselfs are amazing. Nothing was too much trouble and we were very appreciative of all the help they gave us, specially on the first day we arrive, having been picked up by a towtruck and driven the rest of the way there! Facility's are exactly what was needed, good bathrooms, toilets and camp kitchen! BBQ and pool facility was amazing and the park itself is in a great location and nice and quiet area too but just a short walk into town. Would definitely stay at the park again! Thank you
Reception
Cool spot to stay with the family

First time visiting Batemans bay and got a powered site here last minute- owners were lovely and helpful- site was clean and well maintained- toilets and showers were pristine - pool and kids playground were well looked after.

Would recommend to anyone! Can’t wait to come back!
Good

Good location, well priced and very friendly and accommodating staff.
We will be back.
Staff are amazing! Thank you very much. ❤️
Stopped to see the many sights.

We stayed at this park after a major break down with our car on our way to Victoria.The manager (Karl) was amazing as he organized for our caravan to be put on a site with his own vehicle while ours was left with a mechanic.He & his staff were very friendly & helpful (had a laugh with them too).The gardener does an awesome job as everything looked neat & tidy .The park is located not to far away from shops etc.It may be a small park but its a credit to these hard working people who have made it a great one.

Lovely quiet, clean, and well managed park.
All the staff were very polite and very helpful.
We would definitely stay there again.
Clean, affordable and accommodating. Location is a little noisy from the road but that’s a minor complaint. Dog friendly too!
Great park. Walking distance to town. Will stay there again
If you want cockroaches in your bed

Immaculate caravan park, delightful grassed sites beautifullly maintained. Whilst the ablution amenities are a bit old ,they were very clean n tidy& the water was piping hot.
A dog friendly caravan park, they offer a small bag of dog treats & poo pick up bags.Could be handy to be given a small map of dog friendly areas for exercising as there isn't anywhere in the park itself. 😁
Wifí is available...

Such a lovely park to stay at in our mobilehome
Very friendly and lovely man in their office who was so terrific in making suggestions on places to go and see
Thank you again from tony and Julie russ
Responsive owners. Any issues you can call them with 0 dramas

Staff were very friendly and provided everything I needed. They answered all of my questions. The cabin was new and clean. It was completely equipped. The place has a nice space and you can find many facilities. Good location. At the reception you can find some stuff to buy as drinks.
We had a great time with our campervan, the service team is great, bathrooms and environments are always clean, I recommend it!

We lost the wheel from our caravan on Boxing Day when Batemans Bay was packed. The NRMA got us a cabin at Batemans Bay holiday Park. The management were outstanding in their ability to squeeze us in and juggle cabins for our forced stay. can’t recommend them too highly.
Great little park, really well run with friendly helpful staff. Close to town, great pool and BBQ area for communal use, good variety of accommodation types, definitely a hidden well priced gem.
Located in industrial area. Older style resort. 10 minutes till soldiers club easy walk.

We found this accommodation after a very bad experience at a nearby hotel. A family of 7, one with a disability and a 6 month old baby. The managers and staff were so helpful and welcoming, making every attempt to make sure we were happy and comfortable. The cabins were clean, well equipped, with all that we needed. The pool and play area were clean and safe for the kids. 2 days of peace, quiet and calm. Just what was needed. And within driving distance to shops and the beach..
Great holiday park 😊 owner very friendly and so helpful in accommodating our big setup 😊 dog friendly 😊 clean amenities and a nice pool area 😊🙃😊

We stayed here for 10 days, ammenities we’re perfect and nice clean, they have a nice selection of goodies in the shop at reception, and the park managers were lovely, helpful and down to earth and nothing was too much for them.

Excellent the owners are really nice and understanding and helpful. They are also offered dog treats and their pet friendly which is a bonus. I recommend this if you would like to bring your fury friend with you on a holiday also very clean and the beds are comfortable.

Excellent and comfortable stay and value, hot showers, clean and tidy, kind staff. Easy to get to and great location. The hostel section has a huge kitchen and living area, heaters in the room and towels and toiletries, the bathroom is clean and tidy, and the area is handy to all the stunning places around Bateman’s Bay

This is a very old park full of permanent residents caravans and add ons .
Very old amenities but they work .
Tiny camp kitchen and very old washing machines.
There are better and more modern parks such as big 4 in the area , Carl the manager was very friendly but he’s working with a very old location and clearly no money spent on upgrades to amenities in a very long time .
Service was excellent they answered the phone after hours and provided us a caravan. The owners are really friendly the caravans are old but decently clean. Would return again

I stayed for 3 nights when my car broke down.  Pet friendly accommodation that has everything you need.  Clean amenities.  Friendly, helpful staff.  I stayed in both a budget van and a cabin with ensuite.  I had everything I needed and I found the location to be good.

Very disappointed in this park paid $115 for a purple carvan witch was very cute. The staff started off very nice n friendly we booked very late and they still let us book. But then everything changed the bed was not clean had dust mites in it so we slept with our own stuff, not all the windows would shut the main door to get in and out was a pain to lock but the worst part was when we plugged in the heater in and it started making funny nosies so I asked my 8 year old to turn it off and when she did she was electrocuted by it she told them the next day and they said o sorry that never happens we will go check  then I rang them and I pretty much got told to suck eggs.
Clean facilities, pitches close together

Highly recommended for any first time Motor Home drivers.
Carl we can't thank you enough for your patience, help and nothing is too much trouble attitude that you gave Deb & Deb when we stayed overnight on Sunday 14 April.
We had no experience in backing a motor home as only picked up that afternoon, after requesting a football size site so as we didn't upset any of Carls guests he guided Debbie perfectly into our site...drive straight in and worry about getting out in the morning  he said as it was getting late. Next morning we advised Carl we are ready to leave and he directed us out and on our way back home to Victoria all with lots of advice and a big smile on his face 😁
The park was very quite and peaceful and lovely clean facilities
Thank you for your help mate and we will pop back in on our next road trip hopefully for a longer stay.
We made it home safely
在Booking 上订错了房型，无法入住。现场接待Bill 先生不厌其烦地带着我们实地看了好几个房型，直到我们确认满意为止。第二天上午还准许我们延迟一小时退房。在此再次感谢Bill 先生的帮助和照顾🙏🙏。
Enjoyed our stay at Batemans Bay Holiday Park. We stay 2 nights. The hosts were very friend and accommodating.  The site we had was spacious and the park well maintained.
very convenient area with shop nearly by, Nice area with kids free to play, pool and park, but rooms are a bit old .
Friendly new managers, bit noisy from longer term residents but all ok. Within walking distance to major shopping

The staff were helpful and very friendly. The cabin we stayed in was okay for two pensioners, no complaints though there was only access to one side of the double bed, being against a wall but we managed okay, would go for a twin next time. Bathroom was tiny but suited our needs. Would recommend dominoes pizzas if you would like to have food delivered!
Manager thought he was good or somethin, 1 star for respect, manners and childish behaviour 👎🏼

I would recommend this campground to anyone. There is a pool, playground super clean facilities and the owners are so nice. We arrived late without a reservation however they made everything feel like home. Overall great experience and super camping !

We stayed there passing through in our motor home. They were so accommodating and nothing seemed to be an issue. The area was clean and very quiet. We were allowed our 2 Cavoodles which was really nice. Very clean amenities and area. We were so grateful as it was a welcoming stay after such a long drive, so we were very rested the next day! Thank you again!

Stayed for Crank It Up RocknRoll festival.
Owners went out of their way to help us.Very affordable and close and suited our needs.We will be back next year.Thank You.

We stayed there last school holidays with our massive camper and a bunch of kids.  The park is clean and very well maintained.  The staff went above and beyond to ensure we enjoyed our stay.  We loved it so mucb we stayed an extra 3 days.  Highly recommend for people with big familys!!
The only complaint we had is that our time here was up and we had to leave. Lovely amenities and friendly staff and the views from park are breath taking. We will definitely be back.

Stayed 2 nights in a pet friendly cabin, just what we needed. Older style cabins but spotlessly clean , comfortable and quiet. New owners are making improvements and are very friendly and helpful. Will definitely stay again. PET FRIENDLY. 👍
Good spot, affordable and friendly service.
Lovely little park, affordable accommodation. Staff go out of their way to make you feel comfortable. We will most certainly stay again.

clean and lovely staff
thank you for the amazing stay
Looking fantastic since it changed owners. Rooms to suit all budgets. Friendly, helpful staff. I recommend this park for your next stay in the beautiful Batemans Bay area.

Far too small and worth the money and time. Pet friendly but I have stayed in 100% better accommodation then this. There is no stove or proper kitchen. The cabin is extremely small.|Mould in the bathroom ceiling vinyl is coming up in the bathroom and kitchen cupboards falling apart.

The cabin looks like something the council puts on the side of the road.
So small for the price.
The grounds are a big mess.
Not worth staying at.
I have two dogs and stayed in much better places then this for only $30.00 more.
Never again.
